subcodes.first_line: O Ali! In certain places some have outwardly arisen, clinging to a branch from among the branches of this Sacred Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی بعضی در بعضی اماکن متمسک بغصنی از اغصان این سدره در ظاهر شده اند که
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @wisdom [hikmat]
